chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave

text: 3206 - وقال الصادق عليه السلام: " حريم قبر الحسين عليه السلام خمسة فراسخ من أربعة جوانب القبر.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3206 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The sanctuary of the grave of al-Husayn (as) extends five leagues (farsakhs) from the four sides of the grave."
